subcodes.first_line: Your missive, composed in the Persian tongue, was presented before the Divine Throne and was regarded with the glance of favor. God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب بلسان پارسی تلقاء عرش الهی حاضر و بطرف عنایت ملاحظه شد انشاء الله
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @law of cause and effect, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
